# Lane Maturity Report

- Level 2 (INTEGRATION):              **41**

- Level 0 (SKETCH):                   **15**

## Gate definitions

- **`impl_complete`** â€” Production code lands; no NotImplementedError; all CLI flags wired; all error paths covered.
- **`real_archive_empirical`** â€” Real-archive empirical measurement on Lane G v3 anchor (or equivalent baseline). Tagged [empirical:<artifact>].
- **`contest_cuda`** â€” Actual [contest-CUDA] score from Vast.ai 4090 / Modal A100 / equivalent. NOT [contest-CPU advisory]. NEVER MPS.
- **`strict_preflight`** â€” STRICT preflight check covering the lane's bug class (or warn-only with documented STRICT promotion path).
- **`three_clean_review`** â€” 3-clean-pass adversarial review per CLAUDE.md Recursive adversarial review protocol. Counter at 3/3 with rotating perspectives, no new bugs.
- **`memory_entry`** â€” Memory file documenting empirical result + dispatch metadata + cross-refs.
- **`deploy_runbook`** â€” Deploy script + heartbeat + watchdog + harvest path documented (e.g. scripts/remote_lane_<id>.sh).
